data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for milestone-based billing (% complete invoicing). However, the provided evidence does not include any checks or endpoints that demonstrate this functionality. The use case mentions the need for milestone-based billing, but there is no concrete evidence or implementation details to confirm that this requirement is covered, leading to a clear gap in requirement satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of milestone-based billing (% complete invoicing) implementation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for milestone-based billing
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that invoices can be generated based on milestone completion percentages.
